title: Apocalypse compare all player dice and resolve matching result

card.rawText: All players must roll 1 die each turn. If the result of all dice match, all primary creatures receive 100 damage. If this effect occurs, send this card to the cemetery.

effect.value: If all players' D6 results match, all primary creatures receive 100 damage and this card goes to cemetery
